allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Update guitars 7-11 with new images and comprehensive site improvements

Guitar Updates:
- Guitar 7: Replace 7 images with 3 new photos (IMG_5333, IMG_5336, IMG_5337)
- Guitar 8: Rename to "Spalted Maple Multiscale", add 6 new images (IMG_5393-5398), update specs to separate top/body
- Guitar 9: Add all 12 images to gallery (IMG_5338-5352)
- Guitar 10: Add all 16 images to gallery (IMG_5367-5383), update Selected Works to IMG_5382
- Guitar 11: Add all 14 images to gallery (IMG_5353-5366), swap to featured spot in Selected Works

Site-wide Changes:
- Update Dorweiler Experience section image to IMG_5367 with no-zoom class
- Remove broken video player from guitar 6 detail page
- Replace Build #2 with Build #8 in Selected Works grid
- Swap Build #7 and Build #11 positions (Build #11 now featured)
- Update all portfolio thumbnails across index.html and guitars.html
- Update hero slideshow backgrounds for guitars 7 and 11
- Archive old images to old/ directories for all updated guitars

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Update Portfolio section image to guitar 8 spalted maple detail

- Replace guitar 7 image with IMG_5389.png from guitar 8
- Shows spalted maple multiscale detail in Portfolio feature section

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Improve navbar logo fade-in timing on index page

- Change hero visibility threshold from 75% to 30% of hero section height
- Navbar logo now starts fading in immediately when scrolling begins
- Logo fully visible by the time hero logo leaves center of viewport
- Creates smoother transition between hero logo and navbar logo

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
